Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Bleak Direction
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +10% (augmented)
Pack Size: +7% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +66% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +80% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Tough" (Tier: 1) }
22(20-25)% more Monster Life
{ Prefix Modifier "Painful" (Tier: 1) }
16(15-19)% increased Monster Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Puncturing" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 18(15-20)% chance to inflict Bleeding on Hit
{ Suffix Modifier "of Obstruction" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters take 27(26-30)% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Hits
{ Suffix Modifier "of Hexwarding" (Tier: 1) }
46(50-40)% less effect of Curses on Monsters
{ Suffix Modifier "Shocking" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Shocked Ground — Unscalable Value
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
